nodes.name: 巴基斯坦

nodes.name: Plain leaf warbler
nodes.summary: The plain leaf warbler (Phylloscopus neglectus) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Phylloscopidae. It is found in Afghanistan, Bahrain, India, Iran, Oman, Pakistan, Russia, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, United Arab Emirates, and Uzbekistan. Its natural habitat is temperate forests. References
